editors_pick.title: AI: Friend or Foe? (with Michael Graham)
editors_pick.summary: Melissa Kruger and Courtney Doctor talk with Michael Graham about what Christians should know about artificial intelligence, including how to evaluate which uses are helpful and which are dangerous.
editors_pick.author: Courtney Doctor, Melissa Kruger, Michael Graham

articles.title: AI: Friend or Foe? (with Michael Graham)
articles.summary: Melissa Kruger and Courtney Doctor talk with Michael Graham about what Christians should know about artificial intelligence, including how to evaluate which uses are helpful and which are dangerous.
articles.author: Courtney Doctor, Melissa Kruger, Michael Graham

articles.title: Love (and Work Well with) Your Gen Z Employees
articles.summary: Gen-Z college grads are less likely to have held a summer job, more likely to do remote work, and more likely to rely on AI than any other generation.
articles.author: Sarah Eekhoff Zylstra, Erica Roth
